title: Board Briefing Package
subtitle: A compact example package for resolutions, updates, and supporting material.

landing.intro: Start here for the shape of the package, then use Resolutions for decision items and Updates for current context. The left navigation opens individual documents inside each area.

sections.title: Resolutions
sections.description: Decision items, draft resolution language, and supporting notes.

sections.title: Updates
sections.description: Operating updates and context the Board should read before voting.
